about-intro:
Full Stack Developer & UX/UI Designer specializing in interactive 3D web experiences, systems architecture, and R&D in mechatronics.
Builds scalable, high-performance applications that combine engaging visuals with seamless functionality using WebGL, TypeScript, Node.js, and cutting-edge technologies.
about-tagline: Builds interactive 3D experiences and real-time systems that are fast, responsive, and engineered for excellence.
